name: coding-friend
description: Lean toolkit for disciplined engineering workflows with Claude Code

scripts.dev:
printf '
  \033[1m📦 Dev servers starting...\033[0m

  \033[36m■\033[0m CLI watch      → tsup (no port)
  \033[35m■\033[0m Website       → http://localhost:3000
  \033[33m■\033[0m Learn Host    → http://localhost:3333
  \033[32m■\033[0m Learn MCP     → tsc watch (no port)
  \033[38;5;208m■\033[0m CF Memory     → tsc watch (no port)

' && concurrently --names 'CLI,WEBSITE,LEARN-HOST,LEARN-MCP,CF-MEMORY' --prefix-colors 'cyan,magenta,yellow,green,#FFA500' --prefix '[{name}]' --prefix-length 12 'cd cli && npm run watch' 'cd website && npm run dev' 'cd cli/lib/learn-host && npm run dev' 'cd cli/lib/learn-mcp && npm run dev:watch' 'cd cli/lib/cf-memory && npm run dev:watch'
scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-path .prettierignore --ignore-path .prettierignore-root . && cd website && npx prettier --write . && cd ../cli/lib/learn-host && npx prettier --write .
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-path .prettierignore --ignore-path .prettierignore-root . && cd website && npx prettier --check . && cd ../cli/lib/learn-host && npx prettier --check .
